fields.helpText: This field represents Form 6 (Correction) record awaiting transmission to Austin.  Form 6 record is generated when user requests Form '3' or '5' Transmit Status flag be reset (allowing editing of transmitted record). This record informs Austin to delete the Evaluation/Admission or Discharge record already on file, a corrected replacement record of evaluation/admission or discharge data is forthcoming.  Field allows for 200 character fixed length record of free text.  Field updated by package onl
